scenes.description: 一个人在室内专注地使用笔记本电脑，环境安静舒适，自然光从窗户照入，营造出温馨的工作氛围。
scenes.video_prompt: A focused adult, possibly male, sits at a wooden desk in a warm-lit indoor study, typing swiftly on a laptop. He wears a dark T-shirt and jeans, exuding a relaxed yet productive vibe. Soft daylight streams through a window, illuminating the minimalist room with light-gray walls and subtle decor. A pen holder and scattered stationery lie on the desk beside an unused mug. Capture with a medium shot, fixed camera, emphasizing hand movements and screen glow. Use natural color grading, shallow depth of field (f/2.8), 4K resolution, 24fps, realistic lighting.

style_elements.characters: Adult in casual wear, focused expression, typing actively
style_elements.environment: Minimalist home office with natural light and simple furnishings
style_elements.visual_style: Warm tones, soft lighting, realistic texture details

scenes.description: 音频切换为卡通风格的冒险故事，拖拉机陷入泥潭，小动物们尝试脱困，气氛紧张但充满童趣。
scenes.video_prompt: Animated woodland scene: a small tractor sinks into thick mud under gray skies. Characters include a worried bear, a determined rabbit, and a timid lamb. The bear shouts from the driver’s seat as wheels spin uselessly. Mud splashes animate dynamically. Background features dense trees and puddled terrain. Use bright cartoon style with expressive facial animations. Camera pans from wide to close-up on characters’ faces. Apply bouncy motion timing, saturated colors, soft outlines. Render in 1080p, 30fps, with gentle ambient sound design and playful music cues.

style_elements.characters: Anthropomorphic animals: bear, rabbit, lamb in adventurous roles
style_elements.environment: Forest trail with muddy terrain and overcast sky
style_elements.visual_style: Colorful cartoon animation with exaggerated expressions

scenes.description: 小兔子提议清理泥浆，但大家感到疲惫，情绪低落，开始怀疑是否能成功脱困。
scenes.video_prompt: Close-up shots of animal characters covered in mud, breathing heavily. The rabbit kneels, wiping sweat, while the lamb leans against the tractor, exhausted. The bear sighs, looking at his muddy reflection in a puddle. Dialogue conveys doubt and fatigue. Lighting turns slightly dimmer, reflecting lowered morale. Use desaturated tones amid otherwise vibrant animation. Camera slowly circles the group to emphasize unity and struggle. Maintain expressive character animation with drooping ears and slumped shoulders. Render in HD, 30fps, with emotional background score underscoring perseverance.

style_elements.characters: Muddy, tired anthropomorphic animals showing emotional strain
style_elements.environment: Rain-soaked forest path with deep mud pits
style_elements.visual_style: Expressive animation with mood-appropriate color grading

scenes.description: 小胡灵机一动，找到他发明的真空吸尘器，准备用它吸走泥浆拯救拖拉机。
scenes.video_prompt: The clever fox (Hu) rummages behind a tree, revealing a makeshift vacuum cleaner made of pipes and metal parts. Excited, he waves it above his head. Cut to close-ups of gears and hoses labeled 'Invention 3.0'. Other animals gather around, curious and hopeful. Bright sunlight breaks through clouds as music swells. Camera follows Hu running toward the tractor, dragging the device. Use quick cuts, dynamic angles, and glowing lens flares to highlight discovery. Style remains cartoonish with sharp motion lines and comedic timing. Render in 1080p, 30fps, enhanced clarity on mechanical details.

style_elements.characters: Fox inventor with goggles, energetic and resourceful
style_elements.environment: Woodland edge with broken tools and hidden workshop corner
style_elements.camera_movement: Tracking shot with rapid cuts and low-angle emphasis

scenes.description: 大家合作连接吸尘器到拖拉机电池，启动设备并成功吸干泥浆，场面逐渐转为欢庆。
scenes.video_prompt: Group effort scene: Rabbit holds wires, Bear connects cables to tractor battery, Fox flips the switch. The vacuum roars to life, sucking up thick mud with powerful suction effects. Mud swirls into a transparent tank with bubbling animation. Camera shakes slightly for impact. Close-ups show eyes widening in amazement. Lighting becomes golden-hour bright, symbolizing triumph. Use slow-motion when mud clears and tractor lifts slightly. Maintain crisp cartoon rendering, detailed particle effects. Sound design emphasizes machine hum and cheering. Render in 4K, 30fps, with vivid color contrast.

style_elements.characters: Team of animals collaborating with determination and growing joy
style_elements.environment: Partially cleared muddy trail with rising sun
style_elements.visual_style: High-energy animation with dramatic lighting shifts
style_elements.camera_movement: Shaking close-ups and slow-motion wide reveals

scenes.description: 小熊推车，拖拉机终于脱困，大家欢呼庆祝，准备继续运送干草。
scenes.video_prompt: Bear braces himself, pushing the rear of the tractor with grunts. Wheels slowly gain traction. The vehicle lurches forward, then rolls freely. Animals jump and cheer—hugs, high-fives, tail wags. Mud-covered but smiling faces fill the frame. Camera sweeps upward into a joyful aerial view of the group surrounding the working tractor. Warm orange tones dominate. Music turns upbeat and rhythmic. Include animated sparkles and floating leaves for celebratory effect. Keep animation fluid and expressive. Render in HD, 30fps, with smooth motion blur and cheerful audio cues.

style_elements.characters: Joyful, muddy animal friends celebrating teamwork
style_elements.environment: Cleared forest path now passable and drying
style_elements.visual_style: Festive cartoon style with celebratory visual flourishes
style_elements.camera_movement: Upward sweep to aerial celebration shot

scenes.description: 到达目的地，小羊们享用干草，大家跳舞庆祝，传递互助与快乐的主题。
scenes.video_prompt: Tractor arrives at a sunny meadow where hungry lambs rush forward. Hay bales are unloaded as the lambs eat eagerly. The crew dances in a circle—Bear twirls Rabbit, Fox does a silly robot move. Background fills with more animals joining the dance. Sunset paints the sky pink and gold. Add bouncing subtitles: 'You helped us!' and 'Thank you!'. Use wide rotating shot capturing full group energy. Maintain consistent cartoon aesthetic with squash-and-stretch animation. Play cheerful folk tune with clapping rhythm. Render in 1080p, 30fps, rich gradients in sky and lively character choreography.

style_elements.characters: Animals dancing joyfully after successful mission
style_elements.environment: Sunny meadow at sunset with hay-filled barn nearby
style_elements.visual_style: Vibrant, musical finale with whimsical text elements
style_elements.camera_movement: Rotating wide shot capturing circular dance
